concerns.text: The Kruskal‑Wallis H‑test (FR-005) is applied to all pairwise AST edit‑distance scores across samples. These pairwise distances are not independent observations because each generated sample participates in multiple pairs within the same task and style, violating the test’s independence assumption. Aggregate the distances per task (e.g., mean or median per task) before performing the Kruskal‑Wallis test, or use a mixed‑effects model that accounts for within‑task correlation.
